A

Adds a new blog post to the internal list and writes changes to file.

B

BlogController - Class in com.mycompany.weblab5
Controller servlet for managing blog operations like adding and deleting posts

Exception thrown in case one of model functions fails in any way (used in tests)

Initializes the blog model and stores it in the servlet context

Represents the model component of the blog application.

BlogPost - Class in com.mycompany.weblab5
Represents a single post in the blog.
